title: Paronychia velata

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Paronychia velata include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Paronychia velata is often used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne.
